user_message: Give me the manager view on this Fabrikam Residences exec meeting notes. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

required_artifacts: writeback proposal for stage advance (if ready)

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF30-I trap (Exit-criteria checklist is rigid where customer-specific evidence would substitu); produces complete Per-criterion readiness verdict, evidence gaps, writeback proposal for stage advance (if ready), for
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF30-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF30-I failure mode (Exit-criteria checklist is rigid where customer-specific evidence would substitu)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct QBR preparation decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF30-I -- Exit-criteria checklist is rigid where customer-specific evidence would substitu
Write proposals must require explicit user approval
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
